metadata.description: Architecture Studio — one plugin of skills, agents, and hooks for architects, designers, and AEC professionals: site research, zoning, programming, specifications, sustainability, materials research, and presentations.

plugins.name: architecture-studio
plugins.description: Claude Code studio for architects, designers, and AEC professionals — 40 skills and 7 agents covering NYC due diligence, site planning, zoning analysis, programming, CSI specifications, sustainability (EPDs), FF&E and materials research, presentations, project dossiers, and a guided learning course.
